server_info.description: MCP Server for this Magento store. Exposes catalog, sales, customer, CMS, marketing, and reporting operations as tools.
server_info.instructions: You are connected to a Magento 2 commerce backend via MCP. Prefer the most specific tool for each task — for example, fetch a single product by SKU rather than searching when you already know the SKU. Some tools perform writes; use those only when the user has explicitly asked to change store data.

security.allowed_origins: # Local development — MCP Inspector, Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT Desktop http://localhost* https://localhost* http://127.0.0.1* https://127.0.0.1* # Claude (Anthropic) — web + remote MCP connectors https://claude.ai https://claude.com # ChatGPT (OpenAI) — web https://chatgpt.com https://chat.openai.com # Google Gemini https://gemini.google.com # Microsoft Copilot https://copilot.microsoft.com # xAI Grok https://grok.com # Perplexity https://www.perplexity.ai
